title: Agents: AI That Gets Things Done
summary: A chatbot answers a question. An agent takes a goal and works toward it - planning, using tools, checking results, and trying again - until the job is done.

context.headline: From one answer to a working loop
context.description: An agent is an LLM put in charge of a loop: it plans, acts through tools, looks at what happened, and decides the next step - repeating until the goal is reached. This loop is what powers coding assistants and research agents, and it is the buzzword most worth understanding precisely.
context.when: Today's biggest AI buzzword, made concrete
